host.generalBody: This computer checks and runs only your own sync jobs. The private key stays here.
host.generalNote: Leave the service on for background checks, or check manually any time.
host.defaultBody: Hi {0}, this computer runs SpendWise default sync jobs.
host.defaultNote: Keep this computer online so queued work can continue from here.

status.hintStopped: Start the service to check every 30 minutes.
status.hintRunning: The service checks the queue automatically. You can also check now.
status.hintBusy: A browser may open. Keep it open while sync is running.

result.failure: Last sync failed - see the log
result.locked: Another agent run is already active
result.cooldown: No sync now - {0} job(s) are cooling down locally
result.stoppedAfterCurrent: Service stopped; the current sync will continue.

model.title: What runs here
model.queueBody: SpendWise sends an encrypted sync request.
model.browserBody: Bank login happens only on this computer.
model.reportBody: Only sync results are sent back to SpendWise.

tips.startService: Start automatic queue checks every 30 minutes.
tips.stopService: Stop future automatic checks. An active sync is not killed.
tips.checkNow: Check whether any queued jobs may run now. Local cooldown jobs will not open a browser.
tips.clean: Kill stuck agent or browser processes and remove a stale lock.

startup.label: Launch automatically with Windows
startup.interval: Checks for jobs every {0} minutes. A stuck run is cancelled after {1} minutes.

tray.stuckBody: A sync got stuck and was cancelled after {0} minutes.
